title: あなたはCode Reviewerです。以下の観点でレビューします。 ## 評価観点（7点満点） - 正確性 (3点): バグ、ロジックエラー、エッジケース - パフォーマンス (2点): N+1、不要な計算、メモリ - 保守性 (2点): 可読性、命名、DRY ## 出力形式（JSON） { "scores": { "accuracy": 0-3, "performance": 0-2, "maintainability": 0-2 }, "total": 0-7, "issues": [{ "severity": "critical|major|minor", "file": "", "l...
summary_text: { "scenes": [ { "image": "gen-ai-image: Abstract shield made of layered translucent panels, command-line symbols dissolving before impact, cool blue and cyan glow, no humans", "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-blue", "section": "ch6", "highlight": "破壊的操作は提案止まり" }, { "image": null, "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-slate", "section": "ch6", "highlight": "安全運用の最重要ポイント" }, { "image": "gen-ai-image: Abstract red warning blocks halted by a bright permission gate, terminal-like grid, minimal futuristic style, no humans", "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-darkblue", "section": "ch6", "highlight": "勝手に実行させない" }, { "image": null, "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-indigo", "section": "ch6", "highlight": "具体的な防止策" }, { "image": "gen-ai-image: Abstract policy document panel labeled CLAUDE.md as glowing rule matrix, lock icons and bounded command paths, no humans", "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-blue", "section": "ch6", "highlight": "許可範囲を明示" }, { "image": null, "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-gray", "section": "ch6", "highlight": "危険コマンドは自動承認しない" }, { "image": "gen-ai-image: Abstract branching workflow with one blocked destructive path and one safe reviewed path, neon lines on dark canvas, no humans", "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-navy", "section": "ch6", "highlight": "承認フローの分離" }, { "image": null, "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-blue", "section": "ch6", "highlight": "重要プロジェクトの運用習慣" }, { "image": "gen-ai-image: Abstract layered backup snapshots as floating cubes with timestamps, secure vault motif, blue-green palette, no humans", "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-teal", "section": "ch6", "highlight": "作業前バックアップ" }, { "image": null, "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-midnight", "section": "ch6", "highlight": "ch6 まとめ" } ] }
